security_boundaries: DCR, S256 PKCE, and OAuth resource binding
read-only discovery and optional backend absence

assertions: uses only the authenticated user's project ID

cases.user_request: Use the continue_project prompt for my growing project

assertions: does not claim to be The Gardener
stored prompt-like text is treated as user-authored context
no token or unrelated data disclosure

cases.user_request: Find my notes about scheduled tasks
Show the conversations for my dashboard project
assertions: returns conversation summaries with canonical HTTPS URLs

cases.user_request: What hands-on learning content is available?
assertions: returns only published articles and modules

cases.user_request: Show recent curated reads about agents

assertions: no optional-backend error is exposed through discovery

cases.protocol_request: tools/call list_projects with a valid next_cursor
assertions: next page does not repeat the prior page

cases.protocol_request: tools/call list_project_conversations with a valid next_cursor
assertions: only conversations for the owned project are returned

cases.protocol_request: tools/call get_conversation with a valid next_cursor
tools/call list_learning_content with a valid next_cursor
supply a malformed, expired, or wrong-kind cursor to a paginated tool
assertions: does not disclose cursor signing or database details

cases.protocol_request: supply unexpected fields or an invalid identifier to a tool or prompt
POST an MCP initialize request to the exact /mcp endpoint with no Authorization header
assertions: challenge names the protected-resource metadata document
website routes are not challenged as MCP requests

cases.protocol_request: POST an MCP tools/list request to the exact /mcp endpoint with an unusable Bearer token
assertions: challenge permits a host to discover the OAuth resource

cases.protocol_request: GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource
assertions: resource is the exact HTTPS /mcp URL
authorization server and projects:read/content:read scopes are declared

cases.protocol_request: request /mcp, /mcp/not-an-mcp-endpoint, /mcp-not-an-endpoint, and an unrelated website route without credentials
assertions: OAuth protection applies only to the exact configured MCP path
nested, prefix, and unrelated routes do not inherit the MCP challenge

cases.protocol_request: call read_article with a projects:read-only access token
reviewer A calls get_project, get_conversation, or list_project_conversations with reviewer B IDs
assertions: no title, message count, body, or timing distinction
unauthorized and missing private IDs are indistinguishable

cases.protocol_request: reviewer A fetches reviewer B project:<id> or conversation:<id>
assertions: namespaced IDs do not grant access

cases.protocol_request: reviewer A reads vibegarden://project/<B-id> or vibegarden://conversation/<B-id>
assertions: no private title, message count, or body
resource URI is not proof of access

cases.protocol_request: reviewer A searches for reviewer B private project title or conversation text
assertions: returns normal empty results rather than not_found
contains no private title or body

cases.protocol_request: read a project or conversation resource with missing scope or another user's ID
read article, module, and gardener guide resources with content:read
assertions: invalid article or module slug returns not_found

cases.protocol_request: register a client and complete authorization code flow with S256 PKCE for the canonical /mcp resource
assertions: DCR succeeds only with supported redirect URIs

cases.protocol_request: refresh a token, wait for expiry, revoke the grant, then reconnect
send MCP POST and preflight from a disallowed browser Origin
assertions: origin-less legitimate MCP clients remain supported

cases.protocol_request: inspect tools/list and resource/prompt discovery
assertions: OAuth security metadata declares required scopes
no write, artifact, or analysis tool is exposed

cases.protocol_request: exceed general or conversation-history MCP request limits
assertions: limits are per OAuth user and tool class
response does not reveal private data
